block_02: With the present e-mail, we hereby inform you of the termination of your Agreement with the Company, effective immediately as per the Company’s Terms and Conditions  due to violation of your contractual obligations consisting of use of different IP addresses from different countries and/or VPN and/or VPS during the course of executing any transactions and/or trades through the Trading Account and/or the provision of the Services. The Company for the said breaches, is entitled to withhold any profit generated by you and terminate your account immediately.
block_03: Moreover, any open positions maintained in your trading account, have been effectively closed by the Company, this present day, as per the applicable Agreement; it should be noted that the Company will not be held liable for any losses incurred on your account.
block_04: Your trading account will be permanently closed within ten (10) days from the receipt of this notification. We urge you to withdraw any remaining deposited funds (if available) in your trading account.
block_05: Lastly, it should be noted that the Company hereby forbids you to create any additional and/or new trading account(s) and you shall not and/or cannot attempt to open new trading accounts with the Company. Following this letter, if the Company identifies that you have created any additional trading account(s), the Company shall be entitled to without giving prior notice, terminate the Agreement immediately, close all open positions, block the account(s), and return any remaining own funds (if applicable) excluding profits. The Company shall have no liability and no obligation to pay any profit for the aforementioned reasons.
